# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "chart.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "chart.name" . }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
    helm.sh/chart: {{ include "chart.chart" . }}
  {{- with .Values.deployment.labels }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
  {{- with .Values.deployment.annotations }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount | default 1 }}
  revisionHistoryLimit: {{ .Values.revisionHistoryLimit | default 5 }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "chart.name" . }}
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  strategy:
    type: {{ .Values.strategy.type | default "RollingUpdate" }}
    {{- if eq ((.Values.strategy).type | default "RollingUpdate") "RollingUpdate" }}
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: {{ .Values.strategy.rollingUpdate.maxSurge | default "25%" }}
      maxUnavailable: {{ .Values.strategy.rollingUpdate.maxUnavailable | default "25%" }}
    {{- end }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "chart.name" . }}
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
      {{- with .Values.podLabels }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      annotations:
        # Force redeployment on every helm upgrade to ensure latest image is pulled
        rollme: {{ randAlphaNum 5 | quote }}
      {{- with .Values.podAnnotations }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
    spec:
      {{- with .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- if .Values.serviceAccountName }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ .Values.serviceAccountName }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.podSecurityContext }}
      securityContext:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: {{ .Values.terminationGracePeriodSeconds | default 30 }}
      {{- with .Values.initContainers }}
      initContainers:
        {{- range . }}
        - name: {{ .name }}
          image: "{{ .image.repository }}:{{ .image.tag | default "latest" }}"
          # Always pull to guarantee the newest image in our fast-moving dev environment
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          {{- with .command }}
          command:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .args }}
          args:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .env }}
          env:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .volumeMounts }}
          volumeMounts:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default "latest" }}"
          # Always pull the latest container image on every pod start
          # Critical for dev environments with multiple daily deployments
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          {{- with .Values.command }}
          command:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.args }}
          args:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.securityContext }}
          securityContext:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.containerPort | default 8080 }}
              protocol: TCP
          {{- with .Values.extraPorts }}
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.env }}
          env:
            {{- range $key, $value := .Values.env }}
            - name: {{ $key }}
              value: {{ $value | quote }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.envFrom }}
          envFrom:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.livenessProbe.enabled }}
          livenessProbe:
            {{- if .Values.livenessProbe.httpGet }}
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.httpGet.path | default "/healthz" }}
              port: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.httpGet.port | default "http" }}
            {{- else if .Values.livenessProbe.tcpSocket }}
            tcpSocket:
              port: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.tcpSocket.port | default "http" }}
            {{- else if .Values.livenessProbe.exec }}
            exec:
              command:
                {{- toYaml .Values.livenessProbe.exec.command | nindent 16 }}
            {{- end }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.initialDelaySeconds | default 10 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.periodSeconds | default 10 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.timeoutSeconds | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.failureThreshold | default 3 }}
            successThreshold: {{ .Values.livenessProbe.successThreshold | default 1 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.readinessProbe.enabled }}
          readinessProbe:
            {{- if .Values.readinessProbe.httpGet }}
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.httpGet.path | default "/ready" }}
              port: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.httpGet.port | default "http" }}
            {{- else if .Values.readinessProbe.tcpSocket }}
            tcpSocket:
              port: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.tcpSocket.port | default "http" }}
            {{- else if .Values.readinessProbe.exec }}
            exec:
              command:
                {{- toYaml .Values.readinessProbe.exec.command | nindent 16 }}
            {{- end }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.initialDelaySeconds | default 5 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.periodSeconds | default 10 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.timeoutSeconds | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.failureThreshold | default 3 }}
            successThreshold: {{ .Values.readinessProbe.successThreshold | default 1 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.startupProbe.enabled }}
          startupProbe:
            {{- if .Values.startupProbe.httpGet }}
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.startupProbe.httpGet.path | default "/healthz" }}
              port: {{ .Values.startupProbe.httpGet.port | default "http" }}
            {{- end }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.startupProbe.initialDelaySeconds | default 0 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.startupProbe.periodSeconds | default 5 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.startupProbe.timeoutSeconds | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.startupProbe.failureThreshold | default 30 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.volumeMounts }}
          volumeMounts:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
        {{- range .Values.sidecarContainers }}
        - name: {{ .name }}
          image: "{{ .image.repository }}:{{ .image.tag | default "latest" }}"
          # Always pull sidecar images as well for consistency in dev
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          {{- with .ports }}
          ports:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .env }}
          env:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .volumeMounts }}
          volumeMounts:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.volumes }}
      volumes:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.topologySpreadConstraints }}
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
